title: Nebulus Juice Trader
description: add a new trader  with 5 drinks and structure also a new enchantment effect
body:
This mod adds a brand new trader the Juice Trader

You will find this trader at following biomes: Birch-,Flower-,Dark- and Plains-Forest

The Workstation of the trader is the Bookshelf



This mod fetures:

 • Also in this mod you get five New Drinks

 • You get a new structur where the trader lives

 • Adds a new magical effect



You are free to include this mod in your modpacks
